gist.headline: From stream to script
gist.blurb: YoutubeToBlog just sprouted in the community greenhouse! Turn your favorite video essays into readable posts with a single click.
gist.summary: Added the community-built YoutubeToBlog app to the writing tools showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now easily discover and use YoutubeToBlog to convert YouTube videos into written blog posts.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot collaborating. The robot represents the YouTube video (CRT screen with a play button), while Polly represents the blogging aspect (typing on a retro typewriter with paper coming out).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot typing on a tiny retro typewriter while sitting next to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot's screen shows a red play button, and paper blog posts are printing out of the typewriter. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
